text: Standing in the hallway outside the glass meeting room, I feel like an observer on the threshold of ideas. There is a gentle hum of anticipation, people deep in conversation beyond the transparent barrier. Moving onward, the vibrant colors and bold lettering of the R+D wall awaken my curiosity. Words about care, reflection, and intentionality surround me. I feel both invited and slightly alien, as if on the cusp of insight, yet always searching for my place among these thoughtful objects and the energy of future possibilities.
